title: Best Lawyers® recognizes 57 BAL attorneys in the 2026 editions of The Best Lawyers in America® and Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch® in America | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL proudly celebrates the recognition of 57 exceptional attorneys in the 2026 editions of The Best Lawyers in America® and Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch® in America. In another year of excellence, 28 attorneys were named to the 32 nd edition of The Best Lawyers in America and 29 attorneys were named to the sixth edition of Ones to Watch .
“We are delighted to see the talent of our immigration attorneys recognized this year,” said Managing Partner Frieda Garcia. “This achievement reflects BAL’s commitment to pursuing the exceptional for our clients through excellent service, innovative technology and legal expertise. It is a testament to our oneBAL culture and the high standards we set for our firm.”
The following BAL attorneys were recognized in Best Lawyers:
The following BAL attorneys were recognized in Ones to Watch :
- Claudia Villaseñor-Sanchez
These attorneys will be featured in the 2026 editions of The Best Lawyers in America and Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch in America , the only purely peer-review guides to the legal profession.
